Also list all files in src/template-parts/ directory.

This is research only, do not write any code.

Perfect! I have gathered all the requested reference files. Here's your complete research summary: ## Reference Files for New Template Development ### 1. Enhanced PDP Template **File:** `/Users/jbiggs/code/buy-hh/buy-honehealth-com/themes/HoneLandingPages/src/page-mens-opt-enhanced-pdp.php` This is a comprehensive product page template for testosterone optimization with: - Hero section with autoplay video - Trustpilot ratings marquee - "How it works" social video carousel - Timeline section showing benefits over 7, 30, 60, 90 days - Proven benefits grid with icons - Injections gallery (responsive grid/carousel for mobile) - FAQs accordion - Testimonials carousel with navigation - Alternatives section - Multiple CTA blocks throughout Key patterns: - Sets `$template_name = 'mens-opt-enhanced-pdp'` - Uses `render_cta_block()` function for consistent CTAs - Requires template-parts: cta-block, carousel-navigation, image - Enqueues page-specific JS via `wp_enqueue_script('hone-page-' . $template_name)` - Uses `$theme_folder = get_bloginfo('stylesheet_directory')` for asset paths - Persists query strings via `$qs = get_query_string()` --- ### 2. CTA Block Component **File:** `/Users/jbiggs/code/buy-hh/buy-honehealth-com/themes/HoneLandingPages/src/template-parts/cta-block.php` ```php '; echo '
'; echo ' '; echo ' ' . $text . ($icon ? '' : ''); echo ' '; echo '
'; echo ''; } ?> ``` Used throughout templates with customizable URL, text, icon visibility, and optional CSS classes. --- ### 3. HONE_PAGE_TEMPLATES Array **From:** `/Users/jbiggs/code/buy-hh/buy-honehealth-com/themes/HoneLandingPages/src/functions.php` ```php define('HONE_PAGE_TEMPLATES', [ 'article-hrt-overview', 'article-trt', 'article-trt-new-copy', 'article-trt-old-design-new-copy', 'article-trt-pmax', 'basic-membership', 'basic-membership-v2', 'mens-hrt-aol', 'mens-hrt-aol-forbes', 'mens-hrt-big-swing', 'mens-hrt-cc-buybox', 'mens-hrt-cc-why-seek', 'mens-hrt-enhanced-pdp-1', 'mens-multiquiz', 'mens-opt-comparison', 'mens-opt-comparison-forbes', 'mens-opt-comparison-forbes-hero', 'mens-opt-comparison-wo-quiz', 'mens-opt-enhanced-pdp', 'mens-opt-forbes', 'mens-opt-tiktok', 'mens-opt-tiktok-pricing', 'mens-trt-forbes', 'overview-3', 'overview-hormone-optimization', 'overview-hormone-optimization-monitor-2', 'overview-hormone-optimization-pricing', 'overview-light-rebrand', 'overview-mhrt-affiliate', 'overview-multiquiz', 'overview-pricing', 'overview-pricing-variant-a', 'overview-pricing-variant-b', 'overview-tiktok', 'overview-tiktok-pricing', 'run-club', 'success', 'womens-hormone-imbalance', 'womens-hormone-imbalance-pmax', 'womens-hormone-imbalance-tt', 'womens-menopause', 'womens-menopause-tt', 'womens-opt-light-touch', 'womens-second-funnel', ]); ``` Critical: Your template slug must be added here to enable automatic asset enqueuing. --- ### 4. Color Variables **File:** `/Users/jbiggs/code/buy-hh/buy-honehealth-com/themes/HoneLandingPages/src/static/scss/variables/colors.scss` Primary brand colors: - `$color-yellow: #F8F93F` (primary) - `$color-yellow-dark: #E9D225` - `$color-yellow-gold: #FFD25A` Black & Dark: - `$color-black: #0E0B20` - `$color-black-pure: #000000` - `$color-black-light: #1A1A1A` White & Grays: - `$color-white: #FFFFFF` - `$color-white-off: #FAFAFA` - `$color-gray-light: #F1F0EF` through `$color-gray-darker: #333333` Accents: - `$color-cyan: #39CCCC` - `$color-green: #34C759` - `$color-green-dark: #119555` --- ### 5. Font Variables **File:** `/Users/jbiggs/code/buy-hh/buy-honehealth-com/themes/HoneLandingPages/src/static/scss/variables/fonts.scss` Font families: - `$STIX-Two-Text: "STIX Two Text", serif;` - `$DM-Sans: "DM Sans", sans-serif;` - `$Azeret-Mono: "Azeret Mono", monospace;` Base font size: `16px` with `rem()` utility function for responsive scaling. --- ### 6. Layout/Breakpoint Variables **File:** `/Users/jbiggs/code/buy-hh/buy-mousehealth-com/themes/HoneLandingPages/src/static/scss/variables/layout.scss` Screen sizes: - `$xsmall-screen: 375px` - `$small-screen: 600px` - `$medium-screen: 1024px` - `$large-screen: 1280px` - `$xlarge-screen: 1440px` Provides `-only`, `-and-smaller`, and `-and-larger` variants for media queries. Z-index scale: `$z-burried: 1` through `$z-skied: 5` --- ### 7. Template Parts Directory **Location:** `/Users/jbiggs/code/buy-hh/buy-honehealth-com/themes/HoneLandingPages/src/template-parts/` Available components: - **navbar.php** (218 bytes) - Header navigation - **cta-block.php** (729 bytes) - Call-to-action wrapper - **carousel-navigation.php** (1.6k) - Carousel controls - **image.php** (382 bytes) - Image helper component - **linkbar.php** (374 bytes) - Link navigation bar - **slick-navigation.php** (1.4k) - Slick carousel navigation controls - **percentage-circle.php** (732 bytes) - Circular percentage display - **x-in-x-stat.php** (742 bytes) - Statistical callout component All are PHP includes loaded via `require_once get_template_directory() . '/template-parts/{file}.php'` --- ## Key Naming Convention for New Templates All of these must match exactly: - PHP template: `page-{slug}.php` with `$template_name = '{slug}'` - SCSS: `src/static/scss/pages/{slug}.scss` - JS: `src/static/js/pages/{slug}.bundle.js` - functions.php: Add `'{slug}'` to `HONE_PAGE_TEMPLATES` array This research is complete and ready for your new template development.
